title: Generating a Balanced Binary Search Tree
scenario: Write a function that generates a balanced binary search tree from a sorted array. The input will be an array of integers. The function should return a balanced binary search tree with the given integers.
constraints: Must use an AVL tree data structure
Must return a balanced binary search tree

evaluationCriteria.description: The function implements the correct AVL tree logic to create a balanced tree.
The returned tree is balanced and contains the correct integers.
The code adheres to standard Python syntax and formatting.
The function is implemented efficiently and uses the optimal number of operations.
